_meta.note: Hand-maintained rate overrides. These WIN over the vendored litellm_prices.json. Use for models not yet upstream, custom rates, or pinned-and-verified rates. Costs are USD per single token; field names mirror LiteLLM.
_meta.anthropic_pins: The Anthropic entries below are pinned to rates verified against the claude-api skill (2026-06-04: read 0.1x input, 5m write 1.25x, 1h write 2x). They currently match LiteLLM upstream exactly; kept as a verified pin against an upstream regression. Re-verify against the claude-api skill on Anthropic price changes or new model releases, and update or remove as needed.
